distance_km.note: Search results show the Ski-Trail circular route is 24.4 km according to the trail map. The claim of 30 km exceeds the documented distance.

elevation_m.note: Multiple sources consistently state the maximum altitude difference in Tannheimer Tal is 50 meters, not 400 meters. The entire valley network has only 50m elevation difference.

country.note: Austria is confirmed in multiple sources describing Tannheimer Tal location.

region_state_province.note: Tirol (Tyrol) is confirmed as the region in all sources.

discipline.note: Sources confirm trails are suitable for both classic style and skating.

typical_participants.note: No web sources in search results provide participant numbers for the Ski-Trail event.

year_founded.note: Search results do not contain information about when the Ski-Trail was first established. The earliest race result found is from 2019.

official_website_url.note: The provided URL cannot be verified from search results. Search results reference tannheimertal.com pages but do not confirm this specific event URL exists or is current.

typical_race_date.note: January is confirmed as the typical race month. Historical race result shows January 25-27, 2019. However, search results indicate no Ski-Trail is planned for winter season 2025/26.
